    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Remove duplicate rows\n",
        "\n",
        "df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)\n",
        "print(\"Dataset Shape:\", df.shape)"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Fill missing values\n",
        "\n",
        "# Numerical columns\n",
        "numeric_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=np.number).columns\n",
        "\n",
        "for col in numeric_cols:\n",
        "    df[col].fillna(df[col].median(), inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Categorical columns\n",
        "categorical_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=\"object\").columns\n",
        "\n",
        "for col in categorical_cols:\n",
        "    df[col].fillna(df[col].mode()[0], inplace=True)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "NFFUk0zoMPqs"
      },
      "execution_count": 24,

      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Distribution of Flight Ticket Prices"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Ie5LoFDWLDaE"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "sns.histplot(df[\"price\"], bins=30, kde=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Distribution of Flight Ticket Prices\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Price\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Average Ticket Price by Airline"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "pePWRVJvLIQV"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.barplot(\n",
        "    data=df,\n",
        "    x=\"airline\",\n",
        "    y=\"price\",\n",

        "    estimator=np.mean,\n",

        ")\n",

        "plt.title(\"Average Ticket Price by Airline\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Airline\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Average Price\")\n",
        "\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# Statistical Hypothesis Testing==============\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UXQp6iZEL5Xw"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Airline vs Ticket Price (One-Way ANOVA)\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₀:** Mean ticket prices are equal across airlines.\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₁:** At least one airline has a different mean ticket price."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "HB7gLVAbL-ql"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "groups = [\n",
        "    group[\"price\"].values\n",
        "    for _, group in df.groupby(\"airline\")\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "f_stat, p_value = stats.f_oneway(*groups)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"F-statistic :\", round(f_stat,3))\n",
        "print(\"P-value     :\", p_value)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Hu0xm9NyL7s2",
        "outputId": "2c0f2afa-eb5e-401d-a9ce-d7f1da288081"
      },
      "execution_count": 30,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "F-statistic : 17194.22\n",
            "P-value     : 0.0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if p_value < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Reject H₀\")\n",
        "    print(\"Airline has a significant effect on ticket price.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Fail to Reject H₀\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Vessp0X4MEY-",
        "outputId": "16c87fe5-c997-4893-c27c-2414174e7d24"
      },
      "execution_count": 31,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Reject H₀\n",
            "Airline has a significant effect on ticket price.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Travel Class vs Ticket Price (Independent t-test)\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₀:** Mean ticket prices are equal for Economy and Business class.\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₁:** Mean ticket prices differ between the two classes."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "jKSLCyCGMdgq"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "economy = df[df[\"class\"]==\"Economy\"][\"price\"]\n",
        "business = df[df[\"class\"]==\"Business\"][\"price\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "t_stat, p_value = stats.ttest_ind(\n",
        "    economy,\n",
        "    business,\n",
        "    equal_var=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"T-statistic :\", round(t_stat,3))\n",
        "print(\"P-value     :\", p_value)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "VzEi6lk_MejN",
        "outputId": "21783e97-cbe9-443d-db99-ffe281a23f54"
      },
      "execution_count": 32,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "T-statistic : -1063.852\n",
            "P-value     : 0.0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if p_value < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Reject H₀\")\n",
        "    print(\"Travel class significantly affects ticket price.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Fail to Reject H₀\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "ZRdx5jFHMhUN",
        "outputId": "1af3c43f-eb4a-4f00-cbe7-bcccbd430ccb"
      },
      "execution_count": 33,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Reject H₀\n",
            "Travel class significantly affects ticket price.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Source City vs Ticket Price (One-Way ANOVA)\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₀:** Mean ticket prices are equal across source cities.\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₁:** At least one source city has a different mean ticket price."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "T9anJwynMi4-"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "groups = [\n",
        "    group[\"price\"].values\n",
        "    for _, group in df.groupby(\"source_city\")\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "f_stat, p_value = stats.f_oneway(*groups)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"F-statistic :\", round(f_stat,3))\n",
        "print(\"P-value     :\", p_value)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "GmyE8VSyMmBV",
        "outputId": "0aa602e8-83f0-4d65-a600-69863a4366c1"
      },
      "execution_count": 34,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "F-statistic : 145.119\n",
            "P-value     : 2.2124207459200695e-154\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if p_value < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Reject H₀\")\n",
        "    print(\"Source city significantly affects ticket price.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Fail to Reject H₀\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "i88a3IshMouZ",
        "outputId": "d7dc8b7e-4753-4713-8e10-e71a7bce6883"
      },
      "execution_count": 35,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Reject H₀\n",
            "Source city significantly affects ticket price.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Number of Stops vs Ticket Price (One-Way ANOVA)\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₀:** Mean ticket prices are equal for different numbers of stops.\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₁:** Ticket prices differ according to the number of stops."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "rJwIzXLyMqTW"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "groups = [\n",
        "    group[\"price\"].values\n",
        "    for _, group in df.groupby(\"stops\")\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "f_stat, p_value = stats.f_oneway(*groups)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"F-statistic :\", round(f_stat,3))\n",
        "print(\"P-value     :\", p_value)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "hhCwQgjiMrHV",
        "outputId": "47fbc8c6-92c9-43ec-dbef-c08a759a736c"
      },
      "execution_count": 36,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "F-statistic : 6476.942\n",
            "P-value     : 0.0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if p_value < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Reject H₀\")\n",
        "    print(\"Number of stops significantly affects ticket price.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Fail to Reject H₀\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "S9Nw6DTBMsiM",
        "outputId": "98508bad-7c55-48c9-c4a1-cf50079afbae"
      },
      "execution_count": 37,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Reject H₀\n",
            "Number of stops significantly affects ticket price.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Departure Time vs Ticket Price (One-Way ANOVA)\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₀:** Mean ticket prices are equal across departure times.\n",
        "\n",
        "**H₁:** At least one departure time has a different mean ticket price."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Og05UostMyXV"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "groups = [\n",
        "    group[\"price\"].values\n",
        "    for _, group in df.groupby(\"departure_time\")\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "f_stat, p_value = stats.f_oneway(*groups)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"F-statistic :\", round(f_stat,3))\n",
        "print(\"P-value     :\", p_value)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "9tH6pMyfMzLY",
        "outputId": "0309e57a-fc6d-4b47-b6f6-1997e183393e"
      },
      "execution_count": 38,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "F-statistic : 319.26\n",
            "P-value     : 0.0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if p_value < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Reject H₀\")\n",
        "    print(\"Departure time significantly affects ticket price.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Fail to Reject H₀\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

        },

      },

        {

            "Reject H₀\n",

          ]
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "model_df = model_df.drop(columns=[\"Unnamed: 0\", \"flight\"])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "LyyCxc71Omxl"
      },
      "execution_count": 46,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Encode categorical variables\n",
        "\n",
        "le = LabelEncoder()\n",
        "\n",
        "categorical_cols = model_df.select_dtypes(include=\"object\").columns\n",
        "\n",
        "for col in categorical_cols:\n",
        "    model_df[col] = le.fit_transform(model_df[col])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "NBLvCcmBNqL-"
      },
      "execution_count": 47,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Define Features and Target"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UYEzsxTrOweF"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "X = model_df.drop(\"price\", axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "y = model_df[\"price\"]"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "9CGOqYU8N0HC"
      },
      "execution_count": 48,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"Features Shape :\", X.shape)\n",
        "print(\"Target Shape   :\", y.shape)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "6fisBDPlO0it",
        "outputId": "1ef7b951-860b-469e-aa35-b5c7d11e9c10"
      },
      "execution_count": 49,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Features Shape : (300153, 9)\n",
            "Target Shape   : (300153,)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Train-Test Split"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "q2afwpiuO85V"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "    X,\n",
        "    y,\n",
        "    test_size=0.20,\n",
        "    random_state=42\n",
        ")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Uz7Oj5bbO9_M"
      },
      "execution_count": 50,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"Training Samples :\", X_train.shape[0])\n",
        "print(\"Testing Samples  :\", X_test.shape[0])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "zWS-9ECYPAzZ",
        "outputId": "37f8f3f6-1dae-459b-97fc-78220a0865ab"
      },
      "execution_count": 51,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Training Samples : 240122\n",
            "Testing Samples  : 60031\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "## Regression Model 1 - Linear Regression"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "rHVr0uJSPCjh"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "lr = LinearRegression()\n",
        "\n",
        "lr.fit(X_train, y_train)"
      ],

        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "lr_pred = lr.predict(X_test)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0HtJ8mXFPJ7W"
      },
      "execution_count": 53,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "r2_lr = r2_score(y_test, lr_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "rmse_lr = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test, lr_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "mape_lr = mean_absolute_percentage_error(y_test, lr_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "# RMSLE\n",
        "\n",
        "rmsle_lr = np.sqrt(\n",
        "    mean_squared_error(\n",
        "        np.log1p(y_test),\n",
        "        np.log1p(np.maximum(lr_pred,0))\n",
        "    )\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"R²    :\", round(r2_lr,4))\n",
        "print(\"RMSE  :\", round(rmse_lr,2))\n",
        "print(\"RMSLE :\", round(rmsle_lr,4))\n",
        "print(\"MAPE  :\", round(mape_lr,4))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Ns7IF-q9PgyF",
        "outputId": "b75fd649-e149-4f4a-9f9e-afb97c83525e"
      },
      "execution_count": 54,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "R²    : 0.9046\n",
            "RMSE  : 7014.4\n",
            "RMSLE : 1.7827\n",
            "MAPE  : 0.4354\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "rf_pred = rf.predict(X_test)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "JT7-58MZPrfK"
      },
      "execution_count": 57,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "r2_rf = r2_score(y_test,rf_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "rmse_rf = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test,rf_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "mape_rf = mean_absolute_percentage_error(y_test,rf_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "rmsle_rf = np.sqrt(\n",
        "    mean_squared_error(\n",
        "        np.log1p(y_test),\n",
        "        np.log1p(rf_pred)\n",
        "    )\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"R²    :\", round(r2_rf,4))\n",
        "print(\"RMSE  :\", round(rmse_rf,2))\n",
        "print(\"RMSLE :\", round(rmsle_rf,4))\n",
        "print(\"MAPE  :\", round(mape_rf,4))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "SqWk8ZbzPszf",
        "outputId": "4dc84b11-f769-4b68-c880-b8a376e625f5"
      },
      "execution_count": 58,
      "outputs": [

          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",

            "R²    : 0.9849\n",

          ]
        }
      ]
    },

      "source": [

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [

        "\n",
